openai.label: OpenAI / ChatGPT
openai.action: Add OPENAI_API_KEY locally only if enabling OpenAI API.

cloudflare.label: Cloudflare
cloudflare.action: Add token locally only if enabling DNS/deploy automation.

supabase.label: Supabase
supabase.action: Add Supabase project values locally only if enabled.

playwright.label: Playwright
playwright.action: Install Playwright when browser QA is enabled.

vault.label: Vault
vault.action: Vault should be initialized before public launch.

secretFindings.note: Potential secret-like pattern found. Inspect locally. Secret values are not printed.

dependencyReview.npmAudit:
# npm audit report

postcss  <8.5.10
Severity: moderate
PostCSS has XSS via Unescaped </style> in its CSS Stringify Output - https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93
fix available via `npm audit fix --force`
Will install next@9.3.3, which is a breaking change
node_modules/next/node_modules/postcss
  next  9.3.4-canary.0 - 16.3.0-canary.5
  Depends on vulnerable versions of postcss
  node_modules/next

2 moderate severity vulnerabilities

To address all issues (including breaking changes), run:
  npm audit fix --force
